
  configuration:
    --prefix=/tmp/aerune-ffmpeg-darwin-arm64/install
    --arch=arm64
    --target-os=darwin
    --cc=clang
    --extra-cflags='-mmacosx-version-min=12.0'
    --extra-ldflags='-mmacosx-version-min=12.0'
    --disable-gpl
    --disable-nonfree
    --disable-libx264
    --disable-libx265
    --disable-libfdk-aac
    --disable-debug
    --disable-doc
    --disable-ffplay
    --disable-ffprobe
    --disable-network
    --enable-pthreads

Exiting with exit code 0
